metadata.title: OpenCompliance Ai Governance Corridor Catalog
metadata.remarks: Synthetic public-safe control catalog for the ExampleCo ai-governance corridor. This is OpenCompliance seed content, not framework text.

controls.title: AI system context and intended use documented

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: AI system intended use, deployment context, and named owner are documented for the current review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: AI risk management process and risk tolerances are documented for the current review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Human oversight roles, escalation path, and override responsibility are documented for the current review window.

controls.title: AI monitoring and incident handling plan documented

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Post-deployment monitoring ownership and incident escalation are documented for the current review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: AI-generated content disclosure is enabled and enforcement checks are passing on the public assistant surface.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: AI-generated content provenance metadata is enabled and verification checks are passing on the public assistant surface.

controls.title: AI evaluation design and findings documented

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: AI evaluation scope, testing layers, and findings capture are documented for the current review window.

controls.title: AI data quality and lineage governance documented

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: AI data sources, quality criteria, and lineage stewardship are documented for the current review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: High-impact human review triggers and a contest path are documented for the scoped AI-assisted decision path.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The legality and contestability of significant-effect automated decisions have been fully demonstrated for every in-scope use case.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: A typed task envelope bounds purpose, tool classes, data classes, retention class, and human-review linkage for the scoped AI-assisted operation.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: A rights-ready run trace retains purpose, input classifications, output references, and human-review linkage for the scoped AI-assisted operation.

controls.title: AI supplier and transfer map current

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The AI supplier and transfer map is current for the scoped AI-assisted operation and names subprocessors plus transfer mechanism coverage.

controls.title: Lawful basis and purpose register current

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The lawful-basis and purpose register is current for the scoped AI-assisted processing path.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: A current privacy or AI impact assessment exists for the scoped AI-assisted processing path.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The privacy notice for the scoped AI-assisted surface is currently published, reachable, and linked to the active rights path.
